vocab.meaning: mở rộng chân trời tri thức
vocab.example: Studying philosophy would be a fantastic way to broaden my intellectual horizons and question my own assumptions.

vocab.meaning: một chuyên ngành có nhu cầu nhân lực cao
vocab.example: I am considering pivoting toward renewable energy engineering, as it is a high-demand specialization in today's job market.

vocab.meaning: quá trình đào tạo cường độ cao
vocab.example: I would love to undergo intensive training in digital cinematography to refine my filmmaking techniques.

vocab.meaning: sự theo đuổi học thuật/nghiên cứu
vocab.example: Astronomy has always been a scholarly pursuit I’ve admired from afar, and I’d dive into it if time permitted.

vocab.meaning: có được kiến thức đủ để làm việc/ứng dụng
vocab.example: I'm keen to acquire a working knowledge of international trade law to assist in my family's export business.

vocab.meaning: bằng cấp/hồ sơ năng lực học thuật
vocab.example: Obtaining academic credentials from a world-renowned institution would be a dream come true for me.

vocab.meaning: nền tảng cốt lõi của cái gì
vocab.example: I want to study classical literature because I believe it forms the bedrock of modern storytelling.

vocab.meaning: sự ứng dụng vào thực tiễn
vocab.example: What attracts me to architecture is the perfect blend of artistic vision and practical application.

vocab.meaning: các hội thảo/lớp học chuyên đề nâng cao
vocab.example: I would relish the opportunity to participate in advanced seminars on artificial intelligence ethics.
Learning a third language like Japanese would undoubtedly give me a competitive edge in the global hospitality industry.
